response.justification: Bogdan has extensive software development experience and strong technical leadership, including work in developer tooling and testing infrastructure. However, his people management experience is less clearly demonstrated, and his recent roles focus more on individual contribution than team leadership. Mobile platform knowledge is also not explicitly highlighted.
strengths: Strong background in developer tools, testing infrastructure, and system optimization
Extensive expertise in multiple programming languages and technical stacks
Proven ability to lead technical projects and mentor teams (e.g., organizing workshops, Refactoring Dojos)
concerns: Limited evidence of formal people management experience beyond team contributions
No explicit mention of mobile platform knowledge or direct experience with build systems
Recent roles focus heavily on individual contribution rather than team leadership or organizational change
